_comment: Single source of truth for the Brady wrap-around wire-label catalog. Swift (BradyCatalog.swift) loads this at runtime; the JS `BL` tables in VectorLabelPrint.html and VectorLabelDesigner.html are mirrors of the `js` projection below and are kept in sync by a unit test (BradyCatalogTests). To add or change a supply, edit ONLY this file, then update the two HTML BL literals to match (the test will tell you the exact expected values). NOTE: BM-33-427 deliberately differs between Swift and JS — Swift stores the physical size 1.5x4.0 and rotates the label 90 deg at print time (feedRotationDeg), while JS stores it un-rotated as 4x1.5; both render correctly. Do not 'fix' this.
